calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau's Motion for an Award of Attorneys' Fees Pursuant to CCP Sections 1717, 1032, 1033.5 and 685.040.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert Resner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by defendants Daly City Sushi & Seafood, et al.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau's Motion for an Award of Attorneys' Fees is GRANTED.

Defendants are Ordered to pay attorneys' fees in the amount of $3,000.00, payable within ten days of the date of service of this Order.

Order After Hearing was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Robert Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Westen Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness Ronald Ableman, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Daly City Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc., a California Corp, dba Todai Restaurant; Choo Cheon Chang, aka Choo C. Chang, aka Peter Chang, aka Choo Chung, ind. as guarantor of Daly City Susai & Seafood Buffet, Inc. as follows:
Damages $60,673.13
Prejudgment Interest $6,432.80
Attorney's Fees pursuant to motion.
Costs $475.00, for a total of $67,580.93
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Continued To Jul-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
